status_definitions.observed_domain_specific: A source result artifact exists, but it covers only the Blackwell NVFP4 campaign rather than the requested matched factorial.
status_definitions.validation_only: The new protocol was executed locally to validate logging and oracle behavior; it is not a paper campaign result.
status_definitions.unsupported_validation: The new protocol was executed locally and the cell was recorded as unsupported; it is useful engineering evidence but not measured factorial coverage.
status_definitions.paper_only: A number appears in main.tex but its source result artifact was not located.
status_definitions.missing: No source result artifact for this dimension was located.

source_artifacts.evidence: CUDA-only NVFP4 forward/property runner; includes eager/compiled paths, FP64 references, 0.035 domain threshold, and program-specific forward bounds.
Paper-adjacent report for Blackwell CUDA NVFP4 only; reports 189,455 supported continuation cases and zero numerical findings.
Completed crafted CUDA campaign: summary passes=44,838, findings=0.
Completed CUDA tile sweep: passes=73,486, findings=0, max relative L2=0.0059334361 under a 0.035 threshold.
Completed one-case eager/compiled CUDA reproducer with explicit forward metrics and deterministic digests.
Local validation only: CPU eager, forward/gradient, float32/float64, clean/injected, and fixed 1e-3/1e-4/1e-5; ready_for_paper_result=false.
Local validation only: CPU eager cells are measured as in the previous smoke run, while CPU compiled cells are explicitly unsupported on this Windows/PyTorch host; ready_for_paper_result=false.

Five-seed local diagnostic: all 480 design cells are present; 240 CPU/CUDA eager cells are measured, 240 compiled cells are unsupported, clean false positives are 0/120, and ready_for_paper_result=false.

oracle_feature_coverage.fixed_1e_4: validation_only; paper-only 29/30 claim has no located source artifact
oracle_feature_coverage.certified_bound: implemented_domain_specific; no located artifact for the paper's 29/30 fault-injection table
oracle_feature_coverage.matched_full_factorial: local_design_complete; eager measured; compiled unsupported; certified bound missing

paper_claim_boundary.claim: main.tex reports 29/30 certified, 28/30 fixed-1e-4, and 0/20 false positives.
paper_claim_boundary.rule: Do not import these values into generated result tables until the source certificate/result file is recovered.

completion_gate: Run the protocol in campaign mode on a matched CPU/CUDA x eager/compiled x forward/gradient matrix, across declared seeds and dtypes, retain 1e-3/1e-4/1e-5 and certified-bound events, and preserve immutable JSONL plus environment/artifact hashes.
